title: Preserve All Data
documentation:
## Purpose
A boolean flag that prevents a machine from discarding any input data during transformation, summarization, or extraction. When enabled, all source content is carried through to the output.

## When to use
Enable when data loss is unacceptable, such as in archival workflows, compliance processing, or when a downstream machine requires the full original content alongside derived results.

## Notes
Enabling this flag typically increases output size and may conflict with token-limit or size constraints. See [Preserve Structure Flag](https://capdag.com/browse/media:preserve-structure-flag;textable) for a related flag that preserves document structure without necessarily retaining all content.
